title: Welcome: What 247ROI Builds (And Why It Matters)
summary: A quick overview of what 247ROI does: capture missed leads, book appointments automatically, and recover revenue with AI systems that run 24/7.
keyTakeaways: Most businesses lose revenue after hours and on missed calls.
AI reception + follow-up can recover leads quickly and consistently.
A simple system beats complex tooling when ROI is the goal.

faqs.a: 247ROI builds AI-powered revenue systems that capture leads, book appointments, and follow up automatically.
Service businesses that rely on inbound calls/leads and want more booked jobs without hiring more staff.
